meaning: n.[物]色度(任意一种颜色与亮度相同的一个指定的参考色之间的差异,如彩色电视采用白色为参考色)
examples: After being treated, the wastewater looks transparent. Both BOD and COD values are lowered for 60%. The suspension removed rate to 91%, and chrominance for 77%.
This paper presents a "waveform display method" for checking the colour TV Chrominance Delay Line in the factory, and introduces a simple, practical and self-made test-signal generator.
Applying the theory of multi dimensional digital signal processing, this paper analyses the 2-dimensional interleaving structure of luminance and chrominance spectrum for the PAL signal.
